description: 对指定网页进行截图，支持PNG/JPEG/PDF格式输出，全页面截图，批量处理。Capture screenshots of webpages with PNG/JPEG/PDF output, full page support, batch processing.

properties.title: 网页地址 | URLs
properties.name: urls
properties.description: 要截图的网页地址列表 | List of webpage URLs to capture

properties.title: 浏览器宽度 | Viewport Width
properties.name: viewportWidth
properties.description: 浏览器宽度（像素）100-3840 | Browser width in pixels (100-3840)

properties.title: 输出格式 | Output Format
properties.name: format
properties.description: 截图输出格式 | Screenshot output format

properties.title: 全页面截图 | Full Page
properties.name: fullPage
properties.description: 截取整个页面（非仅视口区域）| Capture entire page (not just viewport)

properties.title: 滚动到底部 | Scroll to Bottom
properties.name: scrollToBottom
properties.description: 截图前滚动到页面底部 | Scroll to page bottom before capture

properties.title: 滚动后等待(ms) | Delay After Scroll
properties.name: delayAfterScrolling
properties.description: 滚动后等待时间（毫秒）| Wait time after scrolling (ms)

properties.title: 页面加载条件 | Wait Until
properties.name: waitUntil
properties.description: 何时认为页面加载完成 | When to consider page navigation complete

properties.title: 截图前等待(ms) | Delay Before Capture
properties.name: delay
properties.description: 截图前额外等待时间（毫秒）| Additional wait time before capture (ms)

properties.title: 加载超时(秒) | Page Timeout
properties.name: timeout
properties.description: 页面加载超时时间（秒）| Page load timeout (seconds)

properties.title: 隐藏元素 | Elements to Hide
properties.name: selectorsToHide
properties.description: 截图前隐藏的CSS选择器（如广告、弹窗）| CSS selectors to hide before capture

properties.title: 等待元素 | Wait for Element
properties.name: waitForSelector
properties.description: 等待指定元素出现后再截图 | Wait for this selector before capture

properties.title: 拦截广告 | Block Ads
properties.name: blockAds
properties.description: 自动拦截广告和追踪脚本 | Auto-block ads and tracking scripts

properties.title: 调试模式 | Debug Mode
properties.name: debugMode
properties.description: 启用详细日志输出 | Enable detailed debug logging
